gui.shincolle.book.chap0.title: Introduction
gui.shincolle.book.chap0.text0d0:
§cShinkaiseikan§0 is a group of lovely ship girls born from iron and grudge, they originally live freely in the ocean.

But one day, a fleet called §9Kanmusu§0 appeared with horrible weapons and began to attack §cShinkaiseikan§0's habitat without reason.
gui.shincolle.book.chap0.text0d1:
Because of this vandalism, §cShinkaiseikan§0 is facing a serious survival crisis.

Only one person can lead the ladies out of despair, it is YOU... become an §4Abyssal Admiral§0 and save them from the crisis!
gui.shincolle.book.chap0.text1d0:
Explore the world and collect four resources: §dGrudge§0, §dAbyssium§0, §dGrudgeful Ammo§0 and §dPolymetal§0 to construct §cShinkaiseikan§0.

§cShinkaiseikan§0 will protect the owner and attack any hostile mobs with a sufficient supply of resources.
gui.shincolle.book.chap0.text1d1: Now go to collect these lovely ladies!
gui.shincolle.book.chap0.text2d0:
§1Additional information No.1 §0:
Did you know that you can right-click to skip 10 pages?

§1Additional Information No.2 §0:
In recent years, anomalous changes in the appearance of deep‑sea admirals have been observed in various regions. Every admiral whose appearance shifted had, immediately beforehand, consumed large quantities of grudge and polymetal.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.title: Resources
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text0d0: §d§nGrudge§r§0 is the residue after mob death, it is also the energy source for §cShinkaiseikan§0.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text0d1:
Kill mobs to get §d§nGrudge§r§0, you can build a mob farm to stably produce §d§nGrudge§r§0.


Combine 9 §d§nGrudge§r§0 to get 1 §9Grudge Lump§0, and further combine to §9Heavy Grudge Lump§0.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text1d0: §d§nAbyssium§r§0 is a metal enchanted by grudge. It's the main material for building §cShinkaiseikan§0 and its equipment.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text1d1: Combine 1 Grudge and 1 Iron Ingot to get 1 §d§nAbyssium§r§0, 9 ingots can be combined to 1 §9Abyssium Block§0.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text2d0: §d§nPolymetal§r§0 mainly spawns in water-related biomes (ocean, river, beach). It's the main material for building §cShinkaiseikan§0 and its equipment.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text2d1:
This crunchy metal ball is one of an aircraft carrier's favorite snacks.

You can find lots §d§nPolymetallic Gravel§r§0 on the seabed.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text3d1:
In addition to iron, you can also use copper, gold, and diamond to make different quantities of ammo.

Replace §9Gunpowder§0 with §9Blazepowder§0 to make heavy ammo.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text4d0: §d§nRepair Bucket§r§0 is made from the most nutritious lava of the ocean and seasoned with a grudge, it's the most popular §cShinkaiseikan§0 drinks.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text4d1:
Right click on ship to repair the ship.

Ships can automatically use the §d§nRepair Bucket§r§0 in their inventory.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text5d0:
§d§nShinkaiseikan Wedding Ring§r

With the classic minimalist style of prong mount and Nether Star Cut, it generously showcases the light of Nether Star.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text5d1:
It symbolizes the beauty of the Nether and the owner's strength, and it's also an important sign of lasting love.

§9Sneaking+Right Click§0:
Marry the ship.
§9Right Click§0:
Activate the ring.

The number of married ships will activate different abilities: digging speed, vision, breathing, mobility in liquid, and immunity to fire.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text6d0: The §d§nShinkaiseikan Ownership Paper§r§0 details the terms for transferring ownership of items. It takes effect only after being signed by both parties.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text6d1:
§9Right Click§0:
Sign the paper.

After the signature of the parties, the owner can sneak + right-click the paper on the ship to transfer the ownership to another player.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text7d0: §d§nDismantle Hammer§r§0 can decompose the ship and recycle some of the material.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text7d1:
§9Left Click§0:
One shot kills the ship. (OWNER/OP ONLY)

§9Sneaking + Right Click§0:
Decompose the ship. (OWNER/OP ONLY)
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text8d0: §d§nModernization Toolkit§r§0 contains a variety of the latest abyssal black technology, can be used to upgrade the ship's attributes.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text8d1:
§9Right Click§0 on a ship to upgrade one of the ship's attributes randomly. The level of attributes is represented by color in ship's inventory GUI:

§7WHITE§0 (Lv1)
§eYELLOW§0 (Lv2)
§6ORANGE§0 (Lv3)
§4RED§0 (Lv4)

The maximum level is §4RED§0 (Lv4).
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text9d0: §d§nInstant Construction Material§r§0 contains some rare materials and the welding gun which provides a temperature higher than geocentric, it can improve the construction speed of abyssal ships and equipment.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text9d1:
Put the §d§nInstant Construction Material§r§0 in §9Abyssal Hydrothermal Vent§0 or §9Hadal Hydrothermal Vortex§0 to increase the construction progress.

§d§nInstant Construction Material§r§0 can only be crafted from NOT USED ship construction items.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text10d0: Offering the heaviest grudge and diamonds to pray for Abyssal Goddess's protection, §d§nThe Grudge of Abyssal Goddess§r§0 will protect the §cShinkaiseikan§0 from fatal damage and give her a will for revenge as deep as the abyss.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text10d1: Put §d§nThe Grudge of Abyssal Goddess§r§0 in the ship's inventory, it will be consumed when the ship takes fatal damage. The ship will recover to full HP and be immune to damage for a while.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text11d0: §d§nWo-Class Command Scepter§r§0 is the aircraft command equipment for magic girl Wo-Class. However the Abyssal Admiral cannot transform into a magical girl, the scepter can only be used by the Abyssal Admiral to command ships.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text11d1:
There are 3 command modes, store up to 9 teams, and each team 6 ships maximum.

§2Single Mode§0:
Only 1 §3Focus Target§0, command will ONLY apply to the §3Focus Target§0.

§4Group Mode§0:
0~6 §3Focus Target§0, command will ONLY apply to the §3Focus Target§0.

§6Formation Mode§0:
Ship move in specific formation and gain additional effect, the command will apply to ALL ships.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text12d0:
The color circle will appear when holding command scepter:

§2GREEN§0:
Ship in §2Single Mode§0.
§3CYAN§0:
Ship is §3Focus Target§0.
§4RED§0:
Ship in §4Group Mode§0.
§6YELLOW§0:
Ship in §6Formation Mode§0.
§7WHITE§0:
Guard target.

§9Left Click§0:
Add ship to the team / Add target to attackable list / Set focus target.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text12d1:
§9Sprint+Left Click§0:
Change formation.
§9Sneak+Left Click§0:
Remove team / Change command mode.
§9Sneak+Sprint+Left Click§0:
Clear team.
§9Right Click§0:
Move and guard / Attack / Sit / Caress.
§9Sprint+Right Click§0:
Guard target.
§9Sneak+Right Click§0:
Open ship's inventory / Formation GUI.
§9List Players:§0
Change to caress mode.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text13d0:
§9Formation§0:
Ships will move in formation at the same speed and gain formation buffs, you need 5 or 6 ships in a team to use formation mode.

If a ship is in formation mode, move/guard command in single/group mode will be disabled.

And if a ship exists in different teams, the formation buff will apply to only one team.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text13d1:
§2Line Ahead§0:
Artillery combat formation, increase firepower but reduces defence.

§3Double Line§0:
A cruising formation with slight firepower buff.

§4Diamond§0:
Defence formation for aerial combat.

§6Echelon§0:
Charge formation with high moving speed buff.

§7Line Abreast§0:
Defence formation for anti-submarine combat.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text14d0:
§d§nModel 21 Zero Fighter§r§0

Scale: 1/48

Made From: Polymetal

Serving Size: 2500g

Serving Per Container: 1

Shelf Life: §k100§r YR
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text14d1:
This model aircraft complies with Abyssal Edible Toys Standard, it's ZERO CALORIES, FUN, and TASTY!

This product contains rich polymetal, helps digestion and absorption of heavy metal, effectively promotes children's growth.




**AVOID SUNSHINE, HIGH TEMPERATURE AND HIGH OXYGEN.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text15d0: The §d§nAbyssal Logbook§r§0 contains detailed information of the abyssal resources, §cShinkaiseikan§0 and §9Kanmusu§0 found so far.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text16d0: The §d§nAbyssal Portable Radar§r§0 can detect nearby owned ships and remotely contact them or give orders.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text17d0:
This stable and durable §d§nAbyssal Admiral's Desk§r§0 is made of obsidian. In addition, to deal with official business, it can also block the gunfire from angry secretaryship.


**Please ask the secretaryship before purchasing the furniture.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text17d1:
§9Radar§0:
Show a list of nearby owned ships, and click ship on the list to carry out other action.

§9Abyssal Logbook§0:
Items, blocks and ships introduction.

§9Faction§0:
Create or add team with PVP mode.

§9Target List§0:
Browse attack target list.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text18d0:
Crafted from the choicest materials and lingering grudges, the §d§nAbyssal Admiral's Chair§r§0 offers comfort so deep, it refuses to let you go. The impact of the bombardment is absorbed right here.

**Please ask the secretaryship before purchasing the furniture.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text18d1: Both Abyssal Admiral and ships can sit.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text19d0:
§9Right Click:§0 Change Abyssal Waypoint stay time.

§9Sneak + Right Click:§0 pairing Abyssal Waypoint / Abyssal Crane and Chest.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text20d0:
When the lava is compressed by heavy grudge, it will become §d§nAbyssal Volcano Block§r§0.

Decorative block.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text21d0:
When the lava is compressed by Abyssal Volcano Block, it will become §d§nAbyssal Volcano Core§r§0.

The core will consume grudge and spread the energy into the environment.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text21d1:
To active the core, place it §9nearby any liquid block and put some grudge§0.

§dEffect Area: width 13 / height 13 (down 6 / up 6) blocks§0.

If a ship is in liquid block within the effect area, she will restore HP and morale value.

The energy is said to maintain skin and beauty, and it's very popular among the Shinkaiseikan.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text22d0:
Twisted abyssal frame, decorative block.

It's a ladder block.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text23d0:
Waypoint block, a player can link waypoints by §dTarget Wrench§0.

If a ship moves to a waypoint, the ship will continue to move to next waypoint.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text23d1:
§9Right Click§0 with §dTarget Wrench§0 to show the waypoint info.
§9Sneak + Right Click§0 to link two waypoints.

A waypoint can save 1 NEXT and 1 LAST waypoint, and the max distance is 48 blocks.

If the waypoint links back to its last waypoint (next = last) when the ship moves to the waypoint, the ship will begin to move backward.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text24d0: The machine block for loading and unloading items to ship. The owner can link the §dAbyssal Crane§0 to §9any chest§0 or other §9Abyssal Waypoint§0 by §dTarget Wrench§0. The ship will start to load/unload items when she gets to the crane and go to the next waypoint after the job is done.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text24d1:
§9Top Left§0 button is §9Power Switch§0.

§9The Top Largest§0 button is §9Waiting Mode§0.

§9Middle§0 buttons with M/D/N are item matching condition.

§9Center 9x2 Slots§0 are loading/unloading targets, leaving them all empty means it will handle §9ANY§0 item.

Loading/Unloading can disable separately, and the ship will not attack and move while craning.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text25d0:
§9Right click§0 this book on ship will increase the ship level 5 ~ 10.

This book can be found in dungeon chest too.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text26d0:
A fluid container for ship fluid transport. There are 4 sizes of fluid containers.
Ships have to equip at least one §9Abyssal Pumps Station§0 to transfer fluid to the containers in the ship's inventory at Abyssal Crane.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text27d0:
§9Right click§0 to set recipe for ship's crafting task.

Please see chap.4 for more details.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text28d0:
§9Numpad 1:§0
§6ADD§r or §cREMOVE§0 entity in §dUnattackable Target List§0. §4(OP ONLY!!)§0

§9Numpad 2:§0
Show §dUnattackable Target List§0.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text28d1:
§dUnattackable Target§0 is immune to all ship's attacks, and can't be targeted. You can add entities like leash knot, item frame, cart, or boat.

This list applies to hostile mob ships too.

Ship, hostile ship and ship's summons can't be an unattackable target.
gui.shincolle.book.chap1.text29d0:
§9Enchant Shell§0 can be made in §cHadal Hydrothermal Vortex§0, and then craft with 8x the same potions to gain the potion effect.

Further, crafting with 8x the same potions can increase the effect chance and duration.

Crafting with different potions will replace the potion effect.
gui.shincolle.book.chap2.title: Construction
gui.shincolle.book.chap2.text0d0: You can start building primary class §cShinkaiseikan§0 in the §9Abyssal Hydrothermal Vent§0 if you have collected enough resources.
gui.shincolle.book.chap2.text0d1: You need §916~64§0 §4Grudge / Abyssium Ingot / Polymetallic Nodules / Grudgeful Ammo§0 and a large amount of lava as power.
gui.shincolle.book.chap2.text1d0:
After putting resources into the §9Abyssal Hydrothermal Vent§0, click the §4"Ship Spawn Egg"§0 icon on the right side to start building §cShinkaiseikan§0.

§9Double Click§0 the icon to enter a §cContinuously Build Mode§0, the amounts of four resources will be recorded and every construction will consume the recorded resources.
gui.shincolle.book.chap2.text1d1:
You can get a §9Ship Spawn Egg§0 when construction is completed, use the egg to create a random §cShinkaiseikan§0.

The spawn egg user will become the §cShinkaiseikan§0's owner.

The amounts of four resources will affect the kind of §cShinkaiseikan§0, ex: §dPolymetal§0 will §9increase§0 the prob of §dAircraft Carrier§0.
gui.shincolle.book.chap2.text2d0:
In general, the more materials consumed, the better Shinkaiseikan you get.

To §9Develop Equipments§0, click the §4"Cannon"§0 icon, the construction requirements are the same as for shipbuilding.
gui.shincolle.book.chap2.text2d1:
§cTips:§0

1. Put §9Instant Construction Material§0 into the fuel slot to speed up build progress.

2. Put §9EnderTank§4 (mod: EnderStorage)§0 into the fuel slot to refuel lava.
gui.shincolle.book.chap2.text3d0: When you have accumulated a lot of resources, you can try to build advanced class §cShinkaiseikan§0 in §9Hadal Hydrothermal Vortex§0.
gui.shincolle.book.chap2.text3d1:
§9Hadal Hydrothermal Vortex§0 is a 3x3x3 multiblock building:

§cBottom Layer:§3 3x3 Polymetallic Block§0

§cMiddle Layer: §34 corners of Polymetallic Block§0

§cTop Layer: §3Heavy Grudge Lump§0

§9Right click§0 the §4Heavy Grudge Lump§0 to activate the vortex.
gui.shincolle.book.chap2.text4d0:
§9To construct advanced §cShinkaiseikan§0:

1. Put resources into the 9 slots.

2. Click the 4 resources icon and adjust the value by arrows.

3. Click §4"Ship Spawn Egg"§0 icon to start construction.

4. §9Double Click§0 to enter §4Continuously Build Mode§0.

NOTE: The leftmost slot cannot be extracted by hopper or pipe, and other slots can only be extracted when the red arrow is in §9Release§0 mode.
gui.shincolle.book.chap2.text4d1:
Click the §4Red Arrow§0 to change resources mode: §9Release§0 or §9Suck In§0.

The large construction requires §9100~1000§0 each resources and lots of lava to process.

And the more materials consumed, the better §cShinkaiseikan§0 you get.
gui.shincolle.book.chap2.text5d0: The equip development is the same with ship construction, put some materials in the §9Abyssal Hydrothermal Vent§0 or §9Hadal Hydrothermal Vortex§0 and click the Equip button to develop equips.
gui.shincolle.book.chap2.text5d1:
The equip info is described in the item tooltip:

Factor Mats:
The number represents the total amount of materials and the effective material.

Rare Level:
Higher the value means the more rare in that equip type.
gui.shincolle.book.chap2.text6d0:
Equips can be enchanted by an enchanted book and anvil to increase the stats. Enchanting costs a fixed 30 levels. There are 3 enchant types: §cWeapon§0, §9Armor§0 and §3Misc§0, some enchantment only works on specific types.

§9Protection:§0 +HP.
§9Sharpness, Smite, Bane, Power:§0 +damage, §cWEAPON§0 only.
§9Unbreaking:§0 +DEF, §3ARMOR§0 only.
§9Efficiency:§0 +reload speed.
§9Aqua Affinity, Feather Fall, Depth Strider:§0 +move speed.
gui.shincolle.book.chap2.text6d1:
§9Knockback, Punch:§0 +range.
§9Frost Walker:§0 +critical.
§9Fire, Flame:§0 +double/triple hit.
§9Lure:§0 +miss reduction.
§9Thorns:§0 +AA.
§9Respiration:§0 +ASM.
§9Looting, Fortune, Luck:§0 +exp gain, §cWEAPON§0 only.
§9Silk Touch:§0 +grudge gain, §3NON-WEAPON§0 only.
§9Infinity:§0 +ammo gain, §cWEAPON§0 only.
§9Mending:§0 +HP recovery, §3NON-WEAPON§0 only.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.title: Ship Maintenance Guide
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text0d0:
§91.§0 By construction.

§92.§0 Found in dungeon chest.

§93.§0 Defeating the spawned hostile ship.


The easiest way is to spend resources to build a ship, and you can find some advanced class ships and equipment in the dungeon chest.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text0d1:
If you have §dShinkaiseikan Wedding Ring§0 in inventory and in the §9Sea/Beach§0 biome, the hostile fleet may appear on the sea.

You can get a ship's spawn egg by defeating the spawned hostile ship.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text1d0:
§91.§0 A ship consumes §cGrudge§0 as fuel. A ship cannot do anything if it does not have enough §cGrudge§0.

§92.§0 A ship consumes §98 §cGrudge§0 per day in idle mode.

§93.§0 Moving consumes extra §cGrudge§0.

§94.§0 Attacking consumes §cGrudge§0 and §dAmmo§0.

§95.§0 An aircraft attack consumes §cGrudge§0, §dAmmo§0 and an §3Airplane§0.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text1d1:
§96.§0 The amount of airplanes recover over time.

§97.§0 Put consumable items into the ship's inventory, the ship will automatically use them.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text2d0:
§91. Right Click§0: sit/stand.

§92. Sneaking + Right Click§0: Open ship's GUI.

§93.§0 You can set party/formation by §cWo-Class Command Scepter§0.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text2d1:
§91.§0 A ship gains EXP by attacking, regardless of whether it hits the target.

§92.§0 A ship levels up when EXP reaches the limit.

§93.§0 Max level is §9100§0 / §c150§0 for §dMarried§0 ship.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text3d0:
§91.§0 6 Attributes: §cHP§0/§cFirepower§0/§cArmor§0/§cAttack Speed§0/§cMoving Speed§0/§cAttack Range§0.

§92.§0 Attribute value is calculated by §3Ship Level§0 and §dAttribute Level§0.

§93.§0 4 Attribute Level: §7White§9(1)§0/§eYellow§9(2)§0/§6Orange§9(3)§0/§4Red§9(4)§0.

§94.§0 Upgrade attribute level by §cModernization Toolkit§0.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text3d1:
§91.§0 Equipment provide some attribute values.

§92.§0 Develop equips in §cAbyssal Hydrothermal Vent / Vortex§0.

§93.§0 Up to §96§0 equips for a ship.

§94.§0 3 type of equips: §9General§0 / §3Carrier Only§0 / §4Non-Carrier Only§0.

§95.§0 Aviation Battleship can use all types of equipment.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text4d0:
§91. Critical§0: Deals §c150%%§0 damage. (§c300%%§0 for §4Torpedo/Missile§0 attack.) Critical attack does not overlap with Double/Triple Hit.

§92. Double Hit§0: Deals §c200%%§0 damage. §4Torpedo/Missile§0 attack does not cause a Double Hit. Double Hit does not overlap with Triple Hit.

§93. Triple Hit§0: Deals §c300%%§0 damage. §4Torpedo/Missile§0 attack does not cause Triple Hit.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text4d1:
§94. Miss§0: Deals §c0%%§0 damage and knockback only. §4Torpedo/Missile§0 attack deals §c100%%§0 damage but the trajectory will deviate from target.

§95. Anti-Air§0: Deal additional damage to §4Fly§0 target.

§96. Anti-SS§0: Deal additional damage to §4Submarine§0 target.

§97. Dodge§0: Ignore the damage and knockback effect.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text5d0:
§91.§0 Ship will attack mob automatically with sufficient §cGrudge§0 and §dAmmo§0.

§92.§0 Ship stop attacking when §4Sitting§0.

§93.§0 Ship can attack while §4Riding§0.

§94.§0 Owner can control attacking by §4Wo-Class Command Scepter§0.

§95.§0 The Owner can adjust the attack AI in the ship's GUI.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text5d1:
§96.§0 Ship will recover HP over time.

§97.§0 Use §4Repair Bucket§0 to recovery HP immediately.

§98.§0 Ship will turn to §4Spawn Egg§0 and drop on the ground if §cHP < 0§0.

§99.§0 Ship's level §4decrease 1§0 if §cHP < 0§0.

§910.§0 The Owner has to spend exp to use the ship spawn egg.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text6d0:
§911.§0 Put §4The Grudge of Abyssal Goddess§0 into ship's inventory to avoid death once.

§912.§0 Ship can use §4Repair Bucket§0 automatically in ship's inventory.

§913.§0 There are type matchups between ships, check: §9https://goo.gl/jmR3Wd§0

§914.§0 In addition to the submarine, all damage will decrease at night.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text7d0:
Owner can adjust some AI in ship's inventory GUI.

§91. Can Melee§0: can melee attack, cost no ammo.

§92. Light Attack§0: Attack with §cGrudgeful Ammo§0.

§93. Heavy Attack§0: Attack with §cHeavy Grudgeful Ammo§0.

§94. Light Aircraft§0: Attack with light aircraft and §cGrudgeful Ammo§0.

§95. Heavy Aircraft§0: Attack with heavy aircraft and §cHeavy Grudgeful Ammo§0.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text7d1:
§96. Aura Effect§0: Enable special power and wedding ring power.

§97. Follow (Min)§0: Ship stop following within the min distance.

§98. Follow (Max)§0: Ship starts to follow owner at the max distance.

§99. Flee HP%%§0: Force the ship to follow the owner if HP < Flee HP%%.

§910. Passive?§0: Only attack back when attacked.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text8d0:
§911. Onsight?§0: Only attack target on sight.

§912. PVP Mode§0: Attack §cPVP§0 target first.

§913. Anti-Air§0: Attack §cAircraft§0 first.

§914. Anti-SS§0: Attack §cSubmarine§0 first.
§9Priority§0: §dAnti-Air§0 > §3Anti-SS§0 > §cPVP§0 > Other

§915. PickItem§0: Some ships will pick items when out of combat.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text8d1: §916. Auto Pump§0: The ship can pump liquid by Abyssal Pumps Station (equip) to Abyssal Fluid Drum. If the ship gets some glass bottles, she can collect XP orbs too.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text9d0:
§91.§0 Enable PVP Mode by §cCreating a Fleet§0 in §3Abyssal Adrmiral's Desk§0.

§92.§0 Default PVP state is §7Neutral§0 to other fleets.

§93.§0 You can §cAlly/Declare War§0 against other fleets in §3Abyssal Adrmiral's Desk§0.

§94.§0 Ship will attack other hostile fleets by enabling §cPVP Mode§0 in AI option.

§95.§0 If §cFriendlyFire§0 = §3false§0, AoE attack will not damage to allies.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text9d1:
§96. §cAlly§0 is §3UNILATERAL§0, the other side can still be hostile, friendly, or neutral.

§97. §cDeclaration of War§0 is §3BILATERAL§0, other side will be hostile too.

§98.§0 Other side will become neutral to you when §cBreaking Alliance§0.

§99.§0 Other side will keep hostile when §cCalling a Truce§0.

§910.§0 You can not declare war against the fleet in the ally list, and vice versa.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text10d0:
There are restraint relations between ships, check: §9https://goo.gl/jmR3Wd§0

§9Destroyer (DD):§c HIGH speed / LOW HP§0, against SS and Aircraft.
§9Cruiser:§0 Including heavy cruiser (CA), light cruiser (CL) and torpedo cruiser (CLT), average attributes.
§9Aircraft Carrier (CV): §cLONGEST attack range§0, against all ships except SS.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text10d1:
§9Aviation Battleship (BBV):§0 Including BBV and Installation, attributes range between CV and BB. §dInstallation§0 has §cLOW firepower / HIGH HP§0.
§9Battleship (BB):§c LOW speed / HIGH HP and firepower§0, against all ship but SS and Aircraft.
§9Submarine (SS):§c LOW speed and HP / HIGH firepower§0, against all ship but Aircraft.
§9Aircraft:§0 Aircraft attack by CV and BBV, against all ship but SS.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text11d0:
Some Shinkaiseikan can summon mounts, it can be enabled in §9Appearance§0 page in §9AI Options§0.

§9Right-click§0 on a mount to ride it, then the owner can control mount movement and use attack skills.

§9Press move key§0 (default:WASD) and §9jump key§0 (default:SPACE) to control movement.

§9Press hotbar key 1~4§0 (default:1,2,3,4) to use attack skills.
Attack skills consume the ship's ammo and grudge, and the cooldown time is counted separately from the ship's attack skills.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text12d0:
Status effect can increase or decrease ship's attributes.

§9Speed:§0 +move speed
§cSlowness:§0 -move speed
§9Haste:§0 +attack speed
§cMining Fatigue:§0 -attack speed
§9Strength:§0 +damage
§cWeak:§0 -damage
§9Absorption:§0 +defence and HP
§cPoison:§0 -defence
§9Health Boost:§0 +HP and HP regen
§9Resistance:§0 -damage by torpedo
§9Fire-Resistance:§0 -damage by non-torpedo
§9Jump Boost:§0 +hit range
§cBlind:§0 -hit range greatly
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text12d1:
§cInstant Damage:§0 damage ship
§9Instant Heal:§0 heal ship
§cWither:§0 damage ship over time
§9Regeneration:§0 heal ship over time
§cNausea:§0 +miss rate greatly
§9Night Vision:§0 Negates the 80%% damage reduction penalty at night
§9Luck:§0 +critical/double/triple hit rate
§cBad Luck:§0 -critical/double/triple hit rate
§9Water Breathing:§0 +ASM and dodge rate
§9Levitation:§0 +AA and dodge rate
§cHunger:§0 +grudge consumption greatly
§9Saturation:§0 increase grudge and ammo gained, heal HP and increase morale over time
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text13d0:
The morale level will affect the ship's attributes and experience gain.

There are 5 levels of morale: §dExcited§0, §cHappy§0, §2Normal§0, §9Tired§0, §7Exhausted§0.

The morale level is marked in the upper right corner of ship's inventory GUI.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text13d1:
§9Idle:§0
Recover morale to §2NORMAL§0 state, out of combat faster than in combat.

§9Caress, Kill:§0
Increase morale to §dEXCITED§0 state.

§9Feeding:§0
Increase to §cHAPPY§0 state.

§9Moving, Attack, Damaged:§0
Decrease morale.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text14d0:
Generally a ship doesn't need to be fed, but you can feed the ship to increase morale and grudge value manually.

§9Right click§0 on ship with food or some items to feed the ship.

You can only feed a ship a certain times within a given period.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text14d1:
§9Grudge, Food:§0
Increase grudge, morale value.

§9Ammo:§0
Increase morale and ammo value a little more than automatically consumed by the ship.

§9Abyssium, Polymetal:§0
Increase number of aircraft for CV.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text15d0:
The owner can caress the ship to reward or simply harass her. A correct caress can §9improve the shop's morale§0 effectively.

To caress ship, hold §dWo-Class Command Scepter§0 and press §9List Players (default: TAB)§0 to change to caress mode, and §9Right Click§0 on the ship.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text15d1:
Caress target is determined by the cross and the relative face angle between owner and ship.

The targets are: top, head, face, neck, chest, belly, under belly, leg, arm, back.

Different individuals have different sensitive parts, be careful of the reaction when caressing.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text16d0:
Ship can help the owner to cook item:

§91.§0 Click the cooked beef icon in AI options
§92.§0 Put the item to be cooked to the main-hand slot (the middle and lower slot on the first page)
§93.§0 Put the fuel item in the offhand slot. (option)
§94.§0 Check metadata/forge ore dict/nbt tag in the same AI page. (option)
§95.§0 Move ship to an Abyssal Waypoint.
§96.§0 Link the waypoint and a furnace block by Target Wrench.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text16d1:
§97.§0 Set the input/output/fuel side of the furnace in the AI option. (B:Bottom T:Top N:North S:South W:West E:East)
§98.§0 The Ship will start cooking the target item except for the main/offhand slot.

Cooking is a difficult job; a less experienced ship sometimes produces dark matter while cooking.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text17d0:
Ship can go fishing to feed the owner:

§91.§0 Click the fishing rod icon in AI options.
§92.§0 Put the fishing rod in the main-hand slot.
§93.§0 Move the ship to the pool with depth >= 3 blocks.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text17d1: §9"Luck of the Sea"§0 enchantment on the fishing rod and luck potion can increase the rate of rare drops from fishing.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text18d0:
Ship can go mining to feed the lazy owner:

§91.§0 Click the pickaxe icon in AI options.
§92.§0 Put the pickaxe in the mainhand slot.
§93.§0 Move the ship to the mine with a lot of solid blocks.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text18d1:
Ship can get ores without breaking blocks.

§9"Fortune"§0 enchantment on the pickaxe and luck potion can increase the number of rare drops from mining.

The mining result is related to the world, biome, y level, ship level, and pickaxe type.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text19d0:
Ship can craft items for owner:

§91.§0 Use §cCrafting Recipe§0 to set recipe.
§92.§0 Click the crafting icon in AI options.
§93.§0 Put the recipe in the main-hand slot (the middle and lower slot on the first page).
§94.§0 Clear slots in ship's inventory in 3,4,5 row.
§95.§0 Move ship to an Abyssal Waypoint.
§96.§0 Link the waypoint and a chest block by Target Wrench.
§97.§0 Put some materials in the chest to start crafting.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text19d1:
Ship level will affect the number of items that can be crafted at a time.

NOTE: Ship will drop crafting items if the chest is full.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text20d0:
§cReq: Metamorph mod§0

Features:

§91.§0 Left click with §cTarget Wrench§0 on own ship to get morph.

§92.§0 Kill friendly ship will not drop ghost morph.

§93.§0 Kill mob ship still drop ghost morph.

§94.§0 Press §cMorph Action§0 key (Default V key) to open Morph GUI. (Own ship morph only)

§95.§0 You can't open Morph GUI in mob ship morph.
gui.shincolle.book.chap3.text20d1:
§96.§0 Player can use ship attack skill in morph and can add grudge and ammo in Morph GUI.

§97.§0 Player can level up morph by casting ship attack skill.

§98.§0 Player can equip ship equipment in Morph GUI, equip slot is shared between all morph ship.

§99.§0 Press §cSneak + Morph Action§0 to toggle skill hotbar.

NOTE: Move speed will not apply to the player (for now).
Player can §9Right Click§0 to use Repair Bucket, Combat Ration, Modernization Toolkit, and Maintenance Personnel Training Book.
gui.shincolle.book.chap4.title: Ship List
gui.shincolle.book.chap4.text0d0:
The ship will be registered to the list when the owner opens its inventory GUI.

§9Name:§0 Ship name.
§9Class:§0 Ship class, there are damage modifiers between ship classes.
§9Factory:§0 Shows where the ship can be built and which material increases its construction probability. For example, "Hadal Vortex / Polymetal (650)" means the ship is built in the Hadal Vortex, and using 650 Polymetal will maximize the chance of getting it.
gui.shincolle.book.chap4.text0d1:
§9AuraEffect:§0
Special ability for a married ship that the owner can enable/disable in AI options.
§9OtherEffect:§0
Other ability like critical passive ability.
gui.shincolle.book.chap4.text1d1:
§9Name:§0 I-Class
§9Class:§0 DD
§9Factory:§0 Abyssal Vent / Grudge (80)
§9AuraEffect:§0
+"Speed" to owner
§9OtherEffect:§0
Pick up items

The most popular abyssal mascot!
gui.shincolle.book.chap4.text2d1:
§9Name:§0 Ro-Class
§9Class:§0 DD
§9Factory:§0 Abyssal Vent / Grudge (90)
§9AuraEffect:§0
+"Haste" to owner
§9OtherEffect:§0
Pick up items

One of the most popular abyssal mascot!
gui.shincolle.book.chap4.text3d1:
§9Name:§0 Ha-Class
§9Class:§0 DD
§9Factory:§0 Abyssal Vent / Grudge (100)
§9AuraEffect:§0
+"Jump Boost" to owner
§9OtherEffect:§0
Pick up items

Always keeping smiling abyssal mascot!
gui.shincolle.book.chap4.text4d1:
§9Name:§0 Ni-Class
§9Class:§0 DD
§9Factory:§0 Abyssal Vent / Grudge (110)

gui.shincolle.book.chap6.title: Commands
gui.shincolle.book.chap6.text0d1:
§9/shipchangeowner§c
§dAuthority:§0 OP only
§dPurpose:§0 change ship's owner

OP, Ship and Player A must be online and in the same dimension (world).

The OP's mouseover ship's owner will be changed to Player A.
gui.shincolle.book.chap6.text1d0:
§9/shipupdateowneruid§3 [Player Name]
§dAuthority:§0 All Player
§dPurpose:§0 update ship's owner UID

If the ship does not respond, try this command to fix the bug. OP can specify a player to update the UID.

This command only affects the ship in the loaded chunk and the player must be online.
If the command does not work, try /shipchangeowner to change the ship's owner 1 by 1.
gui.shincolle.book.chap6.text1d1:
§9/shipattrs [ ]
§dAuthority:§0 OP only
§dPurpose:§0 change ship attributes

Change mouseover ship's level and six main attributes level. Valid value: Ship LV = 1~150, Attrs LV = 0~100.
gui.shincolle.book.chap6.text2d0:
§9/shipcleardrop [range]
§dAuthority:§0 OP only
§dPurpose:§0 remove drop item (grudge entity)

Remove drop item entity within range, default range = 128 blocks.
gui.shincolle.book.chap6.text2d1:
§9/shipemotes [emo]
§dAuthority:§0 All Player
§dPurpose:§0 Show emotes
§dAlias:§9/em, /emo, /emote, /emotes§0

Use "tab" key to show emotes list when typing.
gui.shincolle.book.chap6.text3d0:
§9/shipstopai
§dAuthority:§0 OP only
§dPurpose:§0 stop ship AI

Stop all ship, hostile ship, ship mounts AI and update methods for emergencies like entity dupe bug.
gui.shincolle.book.chap6.text3d1:
§9/shipkill [range]
§dAuthority:§0 OP only
§dPurpose:§0 remove ship

Remove specific class ship within range (default range = 128 blocks) for an emergency like entity dupe bug.

The ship ID is same with the metavalue of ship spawn egg.
gui.shincolle.book.chap6.text4d0:
§9/ship | |
§dAuthority:§0 OP only: get, del
§dPurpose:§0 list or respawn ship

§9list:§0
list all ship cache data, D/E means Dead/Exist in the world.
§9get:§0
summon or respawn ship, the user has to get close to ship within 64 blocks.
§9del:§0
delete the specific ship cache.

OP can use this command to summon/respawn missing ship. Non-OP users can search ship cache only.
